title: Make Miro app icons repository-controlled
goal: Move the already verified Schauwerk Companion outline and colored icons into a deterministic repository contract, test their provider constraints and update the existing app with exact digest-bound readback.

approval.note: Update only icon assets of existing Schauwerk Companion. Preserve app ID, Education-team installation, Funnel URL and exactly boards:read. Do not recreate or remove the app.

acceptance.assertion: Outline and colored icons are committed as canonical assets or generated deterministically from one committed source, with stable SHA-256 and no external font dependency.
Tests enforce square dimensions, supported SVG structure, monochrome outline semantics and deterministic bytes; invalid icons fail closed.
Documentation and a receipt format bind app ID, asset digests, upload responses and provider readback without storing credentials or session material.
The existing app metadata reports both repository-controlled icons and an authenticated Education-team board renders the catalogue entry after a fresh load.
App ID, team installation, canonical Funnel URL and exactly boards:read remain unchanged; no paid feature or broader provider mutation is used.

does_not_establish: that icon upload is required for current runtime correctness
permission to recreate or uninstall the app

implementation_evidence.ci: Six GitHub checks succeeded before merge; full local project validation and Ruff passed.

satisfied_acceptance.canonical-assets: Repository-controlled outline and colored SVG assets are deterministic and digest-bound; the uploaded bytes match the previously verified evidence assets.
satisfied_acceptance.provider-contract-tests: Fail-closed SVG validation and regression tests cover dimensions, structure, deterministic bytes, monochrome outline semantics, unsafe XML constructs and receipt leakage; targeted tests and full project validation passed.
satisfied_acceptance.operator-contract: The merged receipt contract binds app identity, asset digests, upload responses and provider readback while rejecting credential material.
satisfied_acceptance.live-readback: Authenticated fresh-load readback of Education-team board uXjVH6Xj4Ww= opened Tools, Media and Integrations and rendered Schauwerk Companion as an actionable catalogue entry after successful outline/color uploads.
satisfied_acceptance.least-privilege: Developer App 3458764678469340030 retained https://heimberry.tail6dbb90.ts.net/ and exactly boards:read; all other offered scopes remained disabled and no paid feature was enabled.

metadata.outcome: Schauwerk PR #112 is merged. The repository-controlled Miro outline and colored icons were uploaded to the existing Developer App, saved successfully, read back with exactly boards:read, and Schauwerk Companion renders in the authenticated board Tools catalogue after a fresh load.

verification.source_ref: heimgewebe/schauwerk#112 + Miro Education-team catalogue fresh-load readback
